reason_for_decision: The revised article now separates near-term, mid-term, and long-horizon topics cleanly and gives readers a disciplined way to interpret frontier radar claims.
strengths: The maturity-horizon structure sharply improves topic control and retrieval value.
The article avoids hype by asking whether each technology changes deployable architecture or only lab benchmarks.
The watch-list framing makes the piece useful for program planning rather than trend commentary alone.
summary_assessment: This version is publishable and well aligned with the stricter review standard. It turns a broad trend topic into a disciplined architecture and roadmap explainer.
